name: agent-theater
description: Cartoon visualization of the Vaccine Scheduler POC delivery-pipeline agents — who's working, who's blocked, where the pipeline stands.

agentTheater.projectRoot.description: Absolute path to the pipeline project root (the folder containing PIPELINE_STATE.md). Leave empty to auto-detect from open workspace folders.

agentTheater.staleHours.description: Hours after which an agent with no new log entries is shown as sleeping.
